message:
feat(pt-telemetry): Add telemetry storage crate skeleton (process_triage-5y9)

- Arrow schemas and Parquet writer infrastructure
- Dependencies: arrow 53, parquet 53 with compression support
- Integrated with pt-common

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+[package]
+name = "pt-telemetry"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2021"
+description = "Process Triage telemetry storage: Arrow schemas and Parquet writer"
+license = "MIT"
+
+[dependencies]
+# Arrow/Parquet
+arrow = { version = "53", features = ["prettyprint"] }
+parquet = { version = "53", features = ["zstd", "snap", "async"] }
+
+# Core dependencies
+serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1"
+chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
+thiserror = "1"
+
+# Internal crates
+pt-common = { path = "../pt-common" }
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+tempfile = "3"
